result.stdout:
Description:
  A CLI tool to generate fake data. See specific command help for more details about usage.

Usage:
  Lipsum [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                            Increases log verbosity
  -p, --paragraph-count <paragraph-count>  Number of paragraphs to be returned
  --version                                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
